title: T01b — Annex IV Dossier
description: Structured Annex IV §1–§9 technical documentation uploaded in Stage B. EU AI Act Art. 11 + Annex IV §1–§9.

general_description.description: §1 General description of the AI system, its intended purpose, and the persons responsible.

model_type.description: §1 Technical type of model, e.g. 'XGBoost classifier v1.2', 'GPT-4 fine-tune'.

design_process.description: §2 Description of the design and development process, including training methodology.

training_data_description.description: §2 Description of training, validation, and test datasets (Art. 10).

data_governance_measures.description: §2 Data governance and management practices applied.

monitoring_measures.description: §3 Description of monitoring, functioning, and control measures.

logging_capabilities.description: §3 Description of logging capabilities for post-deployment monitoring (Art. 12).

accuracy_metrics.description: §4 Performance metrics reported by the provider (e.g. accuracy, F1, AUC).

robustness_metrics.description: §4 Robustness metrics if available (e.g. adversarial accuracy).

risk_management_file_uri.description: §5 MinIO URI or external URI to the Art. 9 risk management system file.

lifecycle_change_log.description: §6 Log of significant changes made to the system over its lifecycle.

other_standards.description: §7 Other technical or sector-specific standards applied.

eu_doc_uri.description: §8 URI to the EU Declaration of Conformity (self-assessment route).

post_market_plan_uri.description: §9 URI to the post-market monitoring plan (Art. 72).

system_prompt_uri.description: L-branch only: URI to the system prompt (required for llm/agentic/gpai modality).

rag_manifest_uri.description: L-branch only: URI to the RAG manifest (vector-store schema + retrieval config).

tool_inventory.description: L-branch only: list of tool names + permitted scopes for agentic systems.

guardrail_config_uri.description: L-branch only: URI to the guardrail / content-filter configuration.

golden_set_uri.description: L-branch only: URI to the golden Q&A set (≥ 50 pairs) for RAGAs evaluation.
